_meta.description: 18-slice pilot script for 3-minute (180s) end-to-end benchmark. Same script used by all four pipeline variants (P1-P4).
_meta.notes: Distribution: 11 silent + 6 dialogue + 1 stylised action. Mirrors realistic anime episode composition.

slices.prompt: Aerial view of a futuristic coastal city at sunrise, waves crashing against neon-lit seawalls, birds in formation. 2D anime style, warm golden lighting.
Teenage girl with black hair and school uniform stands at a window, morning light on her face. She speaks with quiet determination. 2D anime style, soft backlight.

dialogue.text: Today is the day everything changes. I can feel it.

slices.prompt: School hallway, students walking, cherry blossom petals drifting through open windows. 2D anime style, bright and airy.
Young man with silver hair and a dark jacket leans against a wall, arms crossed. He speaks with a smirk. 2D anime style, cool blue shadows.

dialogue.text: You really think you can change anything? That's what they all say.

slices.prompt: Rooftop at lunch, two bento boxes open, city skyline in background. Wind rustles hair. 2D anime style, warm midday light.
Yuki sits on rooftop edge, looking at the city. She speaks softly, wind in her hair. 2D anime style, golden hour.

dialogue.text: My grandmother used to say the city remembers everyone who ever loved it.

slices.prompt: Ren looks away, expression softening. He speaks quietly. 2D anime style, warm light catching his eyes.

dialogue.text: That's a nice thought. I wish I could believe it.

slices.prompt: Time-lapse of clouds moving over the city, shadows shifting across buildings. 2D anime style, dramatic lighting transition from day to dusk.
Yuki in a dimly lit library, surrounded by old books. She discovers a glowing page. Her eyes widen. 2D anime style, dramatic spotlight.

dialogue.text: This can't be real. These are the coordinates my grandmother left behind.

slices.prompt: Underground passage, flickering fluorescent lights, water dripping from pipes. Mysterious atmosphere. 2D anime style, green-tinted shadows.
Yuki runs through the underground passage, her footsteps echoing. Camera follows from behind. Speed lines, motion blur. 2D anime style.
Ren blocks Yuki's path at a junction, hand raised. He speaks urgently. 2D anime style, dramatic red emergency lighting.

dialogue.text: Stop! You don't know what's down there. I've seen what happens to people who go too deep.

slices.prompt: Yuki pushes past Ren, they struggle briefly, she breaks free and dashes forward. Dynamic camera rotation, speed lines, dramatic poses. 2D anime style, high energy.
Yuki emerges into a vast underground chamber with a glowing crystal structure at its centre. She stops, awestruck. Camera pulls back to reveal scale. 2D anime style, ethereal blue glow.
Yuki's face illuminated by the crystal's glow, tears forming. She whispers. 2D anime style, ethereal blue light on skin.

dialogue.text: Grandmother... you were right all along. The city does remember.

slices.prompt: Ren catches up, breathing hard. He sees the crystal and his expression transforms from anger to wonder. 2D anime style, blue glow reflecting in his eyes.

dialogue.text: What... what is this place? I've lived in this city my whole life and never knew.

slices.prompt: Both characters stand before the crystal, side by side. Yuki speaks with resolve. 2D anime style, warm and cool light mixing on their faces.

dialogue.text: This is just the beginning. There are more coordinates. Will you help me find them?

slices.prompt: Ren looks at Yuki, then at the crystal, then back. A slow smile. He nods. 2D anime style, warm golden light breaking through.

dialogue.text: Someone has to keep you from getting yourself killed. Let's go.
